concept: Elegant Navy Blue Financial Intelligence System

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 lg:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Flat background with 1px subtle inner border (border-white/10). No soft shadows, rely on crisp edges and contrast for the technical feel.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, data grids, and form labels. Center-align empty states or specific modal actions. Mobile-first layout is mandatory.

navigation.pattern: Collapsible vertical sidebar (desktop) / Hamburger sheet (mobile) + Sticky top glassmorphic header
navigation.header_style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A1128]/80 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50

components_strategy.tables: Shadcn UI tables. Hover states must explicitly lighten the row (hover:bg-white/5 hover:text-white). Dense spacing for data rows. Use horizontal scrolling for mobile.
components_strategy.charts: Shadcn Charts (Recharts) for transaction volume and risk scoring. Ensure responsive containers (w-full, min-h-[300px]).
components_strategy.network_graphs: Use 'react-force-graph-2d' or 'reactflow' for Entity Relationship networks. Nodes must use primary/status colors. Ensure canvas is responsive to parent div.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn UI forms. Inputs must have solid backgrounds (bg-white/5) with subtle borders (border-white/10), lighting up on focus (focus:border-primary focus:ring-1).
components_strategy.badges: Sharp edges, tinted backgrounds (e.g., bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 for High Risk)

motion.hover: Explicit background lightening and color changes. Avoid generic scale-up animations on cards, prefer border illumination.

media_and_icons.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight for a premium, elegant tech feel.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark blue textured background with blurred elements
Abstract dark navy painting with subtle geometric structure

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG contrast on all text against the deep navy background. Never use text lighter than muted_foreground without testing.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements, forms, and key informational nodes MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='transaction-table', data-testid='login-submit-button')

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (Headings) and IBM Plex Sans (Body).
Update /app/frontend/src/index.css and tailwind.config.js to strictly use the provided HSL color palette mapping.
Implement fully responsive UI: all dashboards must stack vertically on mobile (grid-cols-1) and use native horizontal scrolling for wide data tables.
Do not use generic blue gradients. The UI should feel like a high-end, elegant intelligence tool (navy, white, sharp accents).
For the Entity Relationship mapping, install 'reactflow' or 'react-force-graph-2d' to handle complex relational data interactively.
All components should use pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts and heavily customized Shadcn UI for interactive logic.
